description.value:
Receive Medication data MTD building blocks for patient H. XXX_Smit
For more info: https://informatiestandaarden.nictiz.nl/wiki/mp:V3.0.0_kwalificatie_medicatiegegevens_ontvangen_MTD
Original description: KWAL Medicatiegegevens MTD Script 4
Receive Medication data MTD resources in a transaction Bundle
Test server to handle a Bundle of type transaction.
Checks if all resources specified by the scenario can be identified unambiguously.

expression.value: Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationAdministration).where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '630586') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '8060') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '22276') ))).count() = 4

Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationAdministration).where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '630586') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '8060') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '22276') ))).where(extension.where(url = 'http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/ext-MedicationAdministration2.ReasonForDeviation').value.coding.code = '406149000').count() = 4

Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationAdministration).where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '630586') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '8060') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '22276') ))).count() = 4

Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationAdministration).where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '630586') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '8060') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '22276') ))).count() = 4

description.value: Confirm that the response Bundle contains 1 Medication resource that contains code '630586|urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.7' (DICLOFENAC NATRIUM AUROBINDO TABLET MSR 25MG)
